languages.text: "Меня раздражают эти крики. Избавьтесь от смутьяна, а его имплант срежьте и подайте к моему креслу. Лучшее на этом судне принадлежит только мне".
"The screaming is wearing on me. Get rid of the troublemaker and have his implant cut out and brought to my throne. The finest things on this vessel are mine alone."
languages.original_text: "Меня раздражают эти крики. Избавьтесь от смутьяна, а его имплант срежьте и подайте к моему креслу. Лучшее на этом судне принадлежит только мне".

traits.locale_text: "The screaming is wearing on me. Get rid of the troublemaker and have his implant cut out and brought to my throne. The finest things on this vessel are mine alone."
"The screaming is wearing on me. Get rid of the troublemaker and have his implant cut out and brought to my throne. The finest things on this vessel are mine alone."
"The screaming is wearing on me. Get rid of the troublemaker and have his implant cut out and brought to my throne. The finest things on this vessel are mine alone."

languages.text: 「その叫び声は私を苛立たせる。その騒ぎの張本人を排除し、彼のインプラントを私の王座に持って来い。この船上の最良のもの全ては私だけのものだ」
languages.original_text: "The screaming is wearing on me. Get rid of the troublemaker and have his implant cut out and brought to my throne. The finest things on this vessel are mine alone."

traits.locale_text: 「その叫び声は私を苛立たせる。その騒ぎの張本人を排除し、彼のインプラントを私の王座に持って来い。この船上の最良のもの全ては私だけのものだ。」

languages.text: "Bağırtısı beni yoruyor. Baş belasından kurtulun, implantını söküp tahtıma getirin. Bu gemideki en iyi şeyler bana aittir."
languages.original_text: "The screaming is wearing on me. Get rid of the troublemaker and have his implant cut out and brought to my throne. The finest things on this vessel are mine alone."

traits.locale_text: "Bağırtısı beni yoruyor. Baş belasından kurtulun, implantını söküp tahtıma getirin. Bu gemideki en iyi şeyler bana aittir."

languages.text: «Tanto griterío me agota. Líbrense del alborotador, arránquenle el implante y tráiganlo ante mi trono. Los mejores artefactos de esta nave me pertenecen únicamente a mí».
languages.original_text: "The screaming is wearing on me. Get rid of the troublemaker and have his implant cut out and brought to my throne. The finest things on this vessel are mine alone."

traits.locale_text: «Tanto griterío me agota. Líbrense del alborotador, arránquenle el implante y tráiganlo ante mi trono. Los mejores artefactos de esta nave me pertenecen únicamente a mí».

languages.text: “这尖叫声听得我心烦。处理掉这个捣乱分子，把他的植入物切下来，送到我的宝座面前。这船上最好的东西都该归我。”
languages.original_text: "The screaming is wearing on me. Get rid of the troublemaker and have his implant cut out and brought to my throne. The finest things on this vessel are mine alone."

traits.locale_text: “这尖叫声听得我心烦。处理掉这个捣乱分子，把他的植入物切下来，送到我的宝座面前。这船上最好的东西都该归我。”

languages.text: « Ces hurlements commencent à m'agacer. Faites taire ce tapageur, retirez ses implants et apportez-les à mon trône. C'est à moi que revient tout ce qu'il y a de précieux sur ce vaisseau. »
languages.original_text: "The screaming is wearing on me. Get rid of the troublemaker and have his implant cut out and brought to my throne. The finest things on this vessel are mine alone."

traits.locale_text: « Ces hurlements commencent à m'agacer. Faites taire ce tapageur, retirez ses implants et apportez-les à mon trône. C'est à moi que revient tout ce qu'il y a de précieux sur ce vaisseau. »

languages.text: "Das Geschrei setzt mir zu. Entledigt Euch des Unruhestifters, schneidet sein Implantat heraus und bringt es zu meinem Thron. Die besten Dinge auf diesem Schiff gehören mir allein."
languages.original_text: "The screaming is wearing on me. Get rid of the troublemaker and have his implant cut out and brought to my throne. The finest things on this vessel are mine alone."

traits.locale_text: "Das Geschrei setzt mir zu. Entledigt Euch des Unruhestifters, schneidet sein Implantat heraus und bringt es zu meinem Thron. Die besten Dinge auf diesem Schiff gehören mir allein."
